baseline.label: St. Synthetic Regional Hospital — outstanding balance

offers.notes: Every nonprofit hospital is required to maintain a written financial assistance policy under IRS 501(r). Households up to 200% of the federal poverty level often qualify for 100% write-off; up to 400% commonly qualify for 50–80% sliding-scale discounts. Apply alongside Bonsai's negotiation — they stack.
Free nonprofit that helps patients apply to hospital charity-care programs. Average client outcome: $3,000+ written off. Useful when the hospital's own program paperwork is dense or denied initially.

best.notes: Every nonprofit hospital is required to maintain a written financial assistance policy under IRS 501(r). Households up to 200% of the federal poverty level often qualify for 100% write-off; up to 400% commonly qualify for 50–80% sliding-scale discounts. Apply alongside Bonsai's negotiation — they stack.

headline: Federal law requires nonprofit hospitals to offer financial assistance — apply for 50–100% write-off.
